mapper.sql:
FROM( SELECT A.* FROM dy_inverter_data_main A INNER JOIN ( SELECT DDM_DPP_KEYNO, MAX(DDM_DATE) AS MaxDate FROM dy_inverter_data_main WHERE 1=1
AND DDM_DATE >= CURDATE() AND DDM_DATE < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
GROUP BY DDM_DPP_KEYNO ) B ON A.DDM_DPP_KEYNO = B.DDM_DPP_KEYNO AND A.DDM_DATE = B.MaxDate GROUP BY A.DDM_DPP_KEYNO )B RIGHT JOIN dy_power_plant C ON B.DDM_DPP_KEYNO = C.DPP_KEYNO
mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(C.DDM_D_DATA) AS DATA , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM( SELECT * FROM dy_inverter_data_main A RIGHT JOIN dy_power_plant B ON A.DDM_DPP_KEYNO = B.DPP_KEYNO
WHERE DATE(DDM_DATE) < CURDATE()
AND A.DDM_DPP_KEYNO = #{type} ORDER BY DDM_DATE DESC )C WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(C.DDM_DATE,'%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(date_sub(now(),interval 1 month),'%Y-%m')

SELECT C.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM dy_inverter_error A LEFT JOIN dy_power_plant B ON A.DIE_DPP_KEYNO = B.DPP_KEYNO WHERE A.DIE_DPP_KEYNO = #{keyno} ORDER BY DIE_DATE DESC LIMIT 1000 )C GROUP BY C.DIE_DSP_ERROR, C.DIE_DSP_S_ERROR ORDER BY DIE_DATE DESC

SELECT A.DI_NAME, -- 각 인버터별 최신 데이터의 저장된 Daily_Generation 값 사용 A.Daily_Generation, A.Cumulative_Generation, A.Active_Power, A.Work_Mode, A.Conn_date FROM dy_inverter_data A INNER JOIN ( SELECT DI_NAME, MAX(Conn_date) AS MaxConnDate FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{type} AND Conn_date >= CURDATE() AND Conn_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DI_NAME ) B ON A.DI_NAME = B.DI_NAME AND A.Conn_date = B.MaxConnDate WHERE A.DP_KEYNO = #{type} ORDER BY A.DI_NAME LIMIT 25

SELECT A.DI_NAME, -- 저장된 Daily_Generation 값 사용 (더 정확함) -- 만약 Daily_Generation이 NULL이거나 0이면 계산식 사용 CASE WHEN A.Daily_Generation IS NOT NULL AND A.Daily_Generation > 0 THEN A.Daily_Generation ELSE ROUND(A.Cumulative_Generation - M.min_gen, 2) END AS Daily_Generation, A.Cumulative_Generation, A.Active_Power, A.Work_Mode, A.Conn_date FROM dy_inverter_data A
JOIN ( SELECT DI_NAME, MIN(Cumulative_Generation) AS min_gen FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{type} AND Conn_date >= CURDATE() AND Conn_date < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY DI_NAME ) M ON M.DI_NAME = A.DI_NAME WHERE A.DP_KEYNO = #{type} AND A.Conn_date >= CURDATE() AND A.Conn_date < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY ORDER BY A.Conn_date DESC, A.DI_NAME

SELECT DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME, Vpv1, Ipv1, Vpv2, Ipv2, Vpv3, Ipv3, Vpv4, Ipv4, Vpv5, Ipv5, Vpv6, Ipv6, Vpv7, Ipv7, Vpv8, Ipv8, Vpv9, Ipv9, Vpv10, Ipv10, Vpv11, Ipv11, Vpv12, Ipv12, Vpv13, Ipv13, Vpv14, Ipv14, Vpv15, Ipv15, Vpv16, Ipv16, Vpv17, Ipv17, Vpv18, Ipv18, Vpv19, Ipv19, Vpv20, Ipv20, Vpv21, Ipv21, Vpv22, Ipv22, Vpv23, Ipv23, Vpv24, Ipv24, voltage_of_phase_A_to_B, voltage_of_phase_B_to_C, voltage_of_phase_C_to_A, Phase_voltage_of_phase_A, Phase_voltage_of_phase_B, Phase_voltage_of_phase_C, Current_of_phase_A, Current_of_phase_B, Current_of_phase_C, Active_Power, Grid_Frequency, Internal_temperature, Cumulative_Generation, Daily_Generation, Cabinet_Temperature_2, DSP_Error_Code, DSP_Alarm_Code, PV_String_Fault_Bit, Temperature_Fault_Bit, Slave_DSP_ErrorCode, Total_Generation_Hour, Safety_Code, Work_Mode, Conn_date FROM
dy_inverter_data
dy_detail_data
WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{type}
AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE()
AND Conn_date >= #{searchBeginDate}
AND Conn_date <= CONCAT(#{searchEndDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 ${InverterType}호'
ORDER BY Conn_date DESC, DI_NAME
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
LIMIT 1000

SELECT * FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{type} AND DATE(Conn_date) = DATE(now()) AND Active_Power = ( SELECT
MIN(Active_Power)
MAX(Active_Power)
FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{type} AND Active_Power > 0 AND DATE(Conn_date) = DATE(now()) ORDER BY Conn_date DESC ) LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM dy_inverter_error WHERE DIE_DPP_KEYNO = #{type} ORDER BY DIE_DATE desc limit 500

select IFNULL(K.power,0) FROM( SELECT * FROM( SELECT IFNULL(ROUND(AA.Active_Power,2),0) as power ,
case when substr(AA.DATETIEMS,4,2) >='00' and substr(AA.DATETIEMS,4,2)<'30' then concat(substr(AA.DATETIEMS,1,2),':00') when substr(AA.DATETIEMS,4,2) >='30' and substr(AA.DATETIEMS,4,2)<'60' then concat(substr(AA.DATETIEMS,1,2),':30')
END as hhmm FROM ( SELECT DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME , Active_Power, date_format(Conn_date,'%H:%i') as DATETIEMS FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE 1=1 AND DP_KEYNO = ${type}
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 1호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 2호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 3호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 4호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 5호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 6호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 7호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 8호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 9호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 10호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 11호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 12호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 13호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 15호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 16호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 17호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 18호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 19호'
AND DI_NAME = '인버터 20호'
AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() AND Active_Power > 0 ORDER BY DI_NAME , DATETIEMS DESC LIMIT 100 )AA GROUP BY hhmm )B right join ( WITH RECURSIVE A AS (
SELECT STR_TO_DATE(date_format(now(),'%Y%m%d06'),'%Y%m%d%H%') AS YMDHM UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(A.YMDHM, INTERVAL 30 minute) AS YMDHM FROM A WHERE A.YMDHM < STR_TO_DATE(date_format(now(),'%Y%m%d19'), '%Y%m%d%H')
) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(YMDHM, '%H:%i') AS YMDHM FROM A )C on B.hhmm = C.YMDHM )K

select DISTINCT K.YMDHM FROM( SELECT * FROM( SELECT IFNULL(AA.Active_Power,0) as power ,
case when substr(AA.DATETIEMS,4,2) >='00' and substr(AA.DATETIEMS,4,2)<'30' then concat(substr(AA.DATETIEMS,1,2),':00') when substr(AA.DATETIEMS,4,2) >='30' and substr(AA.DATETIEMS,4,2)<'60' then concat(substr(AA.DATETIEMS,1,2),':30')
END as hhmm FROM ( SELECT DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME , Active_Power, date_format(Conn_date,'%H:%i') as DATETIEMS FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE 1=1 AND DP_KEYNO = ${type} AND date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DI_NAME , Conn_date DESC LIMIT 100000 )AA GROUP BY hhmm )B right join ( WITH RECURSIVE A AS (
SELECT STR_TO_DATE(date_format(now(),'%Y%m%d06'),'%Y%m%d%H%') AS YMDHM UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(A.YMDHM, INTERVAL 30 minute) AS YMDHM FROM A WHERE A.YMDHM < STR_TO_DATE(date_format(now(),'%Y%m%d19'), '%Y%m%d%H')
) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(YMDHM, '%H:%i') AS YMDHM FROM A )C on B.hhmm = C.YMDHM )K

select DISTINCT
case when substr(Conn_date,15,2) <'10' then concat(substr(Conn_date,12,2),':00') when substr(Conn_date,15,2) >='10' and substr(Conn_date,15,2)<'20' then concat(substr(Conn_date,12,2),':10') when substr(Conn_date,15,2) >='20' and substr(Conn_date,15,2)<'30' then concat(substr(Conn_date,12,2),':20') when substr(Conn_date,15,2) >='30' and substr(Conn_date,15,2)<'40' then concat(substr(Conn_date,12,2),':30') when substr(Conn_date,15,2) >='40' and substr(Conn_date,15,2)<'50' then concat(substr(Conn_date,12,2),':40') when substr(Conn_date,15,2) >='50' and substr(Conn_date,15,2)<'60' then concat(substr(Conn_date,12,2),':50')
end as hhmm FROM dy_inverter_data where 1=1 AND date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') and DP_KEYNO = #{type}
-->
and DI_NAME = '인버터 ${InverterType}호'
order by hhmm DESC limit 7

SELECT * FROM u_userinfo A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_member_authority B ON A.UI_KEYNO = B.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_authority C ON C.UIA_KEYNO = B.UIA_KEYNO WHERE C.UIA_KEYNO = 'UIA_ASDFG' OR C.UIA_KEYNO = 'UIA_CQNSZ'
OR B.UI_KEYNO = #{DPP_USER}
SELECT * FROM u_userinfo A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_member_authority B ON A.UI_KEYNO = B.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_authority C ON C.UIA_KEYNO = B.UIA_KEYNO WHERE C.UIA_KEYNO = 'UIA_ASDFG'
SELECT * FROM u_userinfo A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_member_authority B ON A.UI_KEYNO = B.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_authority C ON C.UIA_KEYNO = B.UIA_KEYNO WHERE C.UIA_KEYNO = 'UIA_LHAPK'

SELECT A.UIA_KEYNO,C.UI_NAME, C.UI_PHONE FROM u_userinfo_authority A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_member_authority B ON A.UIA_KEYNO = B.UIA_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo C ON C.UI_KEYNO = B.UI_KEYNO WHERE
C.UI_KEYNO = #{l}
SELECT * FROM u_userinfo A LEFT JOIN dy_power_plant B ON A.UI_KEYNO = B.DPP_USER where B.DPP_USER = #{DPP_USER}
SELECT B.UI_KEYNO, UI_NAME FROM u_userinfo A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_member_authority B ON A.UI_KEYNO = B.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_authority C ON C.UIA_KEYNO = B.UIA_KEYNO WHERE C.UIA_KEYNO = #{l}
SELECT B.UI_KEYNO, UI_NAME FROM u_userinfo A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_member_authority B ON A.UI_KEYNO = B.UI_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_authority C ON C.UIA_KEYNO = B.UIA_KEYNO

SELECT A.UIA_KEYNO,C.UI_NAME FROM u_userinfo_authority A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo_member_authority B ON A.UIA_KEYNO = B.UIA_KEYNO LEFT JOIN u_userinfo C ON C.UI_KEYNO = B.UI_KEYNO WHERE C.UI_KEYNO = #{userKey}
SELECT COUNT(B.UI_KEYNO) FROM dy_power_plant A LEFT JOIN u_userinfo B ON A.DPP_USER = B.UI_KEYNO WHERE DPP_KEYNO = #{BN_PLANT_NAME} AND DPP_USER = #{UI_KEYNO}

SELECT A.DPP_NAME , A.DPP_KEYNO , IFNULL(B.Daily_Generation,'N') AS checking FROM dy_power_plant A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM dy_inverter_data B WHERE DATE(B.Conn_date) = CURDATE() ) B ON A.DPP_KEYNO = B.DP_KEYNO WHERE A.DPP_STATUS = 'Y' GROUP BY A.DPP_NAME

SELECT A.DPP_NAME , A.DPP_KEYNO , IFNULL(B.Conn_date ,'N') AS checked FROM dy_power_plant A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM dy_inverter_data B WHERE date_format(B.Conn_date, '%m-%d-%h') = date_format(now(),'%m-%d-%h') ) B ON A.DPP_KEYNO = B.DP_KEYNO WHERE A.DPP_STATUS = 'Y' GROUP BY A.DPP_NAME

SELECT * FROM( SELECT DI_NAME, Daily_Generation, Conn_date , date_format(Conn_date,'%H:00:00') as subDate FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{type} AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() ORDER BY Conn_date DESC LIMIT 2000 )A GROUP BY A.DI_NAME , A.subDate

SELECT * , IFNULL(d.Daily_Generation,0) FROM chartdate C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM( SELECT DI_NAME, Daily_Generation, Conn_date , date_format(Conn_date,'%H:00:00') as subDate FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{type} AND DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() ORDER BY Conn_date DESC LIMIT 2000 )A GROUP BY A.subDate, A.DI_NAME ) D ON C.date = D.subDate
SELECT date FROM chartdate
SELECT DPP_KEYNO FROM dy_power_plant WHERE DPP_ADMIN = #{UI_KEYNO} AND DPP_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY CAST(DPP_KEYNO AS UNSIGNED) ASC limit 1
SELECT DPP_KEYNO, DPP_NAME FROM dy_power_plant WHERE DPP_ADMIN = #{UI_KEYNO} AND DPP_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY CAST(DPP_KEYNO AS UNSIGNED) ASC
SELECT DPP_KEYNO FROM dy_power_plant WHERE DPP_STATUS = 'Y'

select DP_KEYNO from dy_inverter_data where DATE(Conn_date) = CURDATE() and HOUR(Conn_date) = HOUR(now()) and HOUR(Conn_date) > 8 and (Work_Mode = 'Fault' or Work_Mode = 'Wait') and DP_KEYNO = #{l} group by DP_KEYNO

SELECT DISTINCT DP_KEYNO FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE Work_Mode IN ('Fault','Wait') AND HOUR(NOW()) > 8
AND Conn_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL MINUTE(NOW()) MINUTE - INTERVAL SECOND(NOW()) SECOND AND Conn_date < (NOW() - INTERVAL MINUTE(NOW()) MINUTE - INTERVAL SECOND(NOW()) SECOND) + INTERVAL 1 HOUR;
mapper.update: update dy_inverter_data_main set DDM_STATUS = '장애' where DDM_DPP_KEYNO = #{l} and DATE(DDM_DATE) = CURDATE() AND HOUR(DDM_DATE) BETWEEN 8 AND 18 order by DDM_DATE desc limit 1
mapper.select: WITH last100 AS ( SELECT DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME, Conn_date FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND Conn_date >= CURDATE() AND Conn_date < TIMESTAMP(CURDATE(), '20:30:00') AND Daily_Generation <> 0 ORDER BY Conn_date DESC LIMIT 100 ) SELECT MAX(l.Conn_date) AS Conn_date FROM last100 l GROUP BY l.DI_NAME ORDER BY Conn_date DESC;
mapper.delete: DELETE m FROM dy_inverter_data_main m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DDM_DATE FROM dy_inverter_data_main WHERE DDM_DATE >= CURDATE() AND DDM_DATE < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND DDM_DPP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND DDM_D_DATA != '0' ORDER BY DDM_DATE DESC LIMIT 1 ) s ON m.DDM_DATE = s.DDM_DATE WHERE s.DDM_DATE IS NULL AND m.DDM_DATE >= CURDATE() AND m.DDM_DATE < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND m.DDM_DPP_KEYNO = #{keyno};
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DP_KEYNO, DI_NAME , Daily_Generation, date_format(Conn_date,'%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') as DATETIEMS FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND date_format(Conn_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DI_NAME , Conn_date DESC LIMIT 100000 )A GROUP BY DI_NAME, DATETIEMS
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dy_predict_dataset ( keyno, name, power, dateTimes ) VALUES
( #{l.DP_KEYNO}, #{l.DI_NAME}, #{l.Daily_Generation}, #{l.DATETIEMS} )

INSERT INTO dy_inverter_error ( DIE_DPP_KEYNO, DIE_DPP_NAME, DIE_INVERTER_NAME, DIE_DSP_ERROR, DIE_DSP_S_ERROR ) VALUES ( #{DP_KEYNO}, (SELECT DPP_NAME FROM dy_power_plant WHERE DPP_KEYNO = #{DP_KEYNO} LIMIT 1), #{DI_NAME}, #{DSP_Error_Code}, #{Slave_DSP_ErrorCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT B.* , C.Dday , ABS(((B.typeA-C.Dday)/Dday)*100) as perA, ABS(((B.typeB-C.Dday)/Dday)*100) as perB FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(avg(pt_power_next),0) as typeA, IFNULL(avg(pt_heazoom),0) as typeB , date_format(pt_date + interval 1 day,'%Y-%m-%d') as formatd, pt_area,pt_volum FROM predict_table group by formatd order by formatd DESC )B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM( SELECT date_format(Conn_date,'%Y-%m-%d') as formatd , (Daily_Generation*2) as Dday ,DP_KEYNO , DI_NAME FROM dy_inverter_data WHERE DP_KEYNO = #{keyno} AND DI_NAME = '인버터 1호' ORDER BY Conn_date desc LIMIT 10000 )A group by formatd order by formatd DESC )C on B.formatd = C.formatd where pt_area = #{area} and pt_volum = #{volum} limit 5
SELECT * , date_format(insert_date,'%Y-%m-%d %H:00') as datetimes FROM sensortable order by insert_date desc
